channel.title: 艾瑞可erik • Posts by "工具" tag • Posts by "undefined" categories
channel.description: 一只PHP开发的程序猿，偶尔搞搞摄影、画画、写作、顺便睡觉。

item.title: Jenkins安装及使用
jetbrains全系列，激活使用
6 个开源的家庭自动化工具 | Linux 中国
最新版翻墙浏览器
item.description: <p>最近一直在弄谷歌收录和解决网站被浏览器屏蔽问题，无奈得用到谷歌站长工具，国内无法登陆，只有翻墙。有了这款浏览器可以做谷歌推广，去国外网站查询资料，登录谷歌邮箱…… 翻墙浏览器工具最新版，下载 <a href="http://sourceforge.net/projects/erik1314/files/win_all/GAEChrome.zip/download" target="_blank" target="_blank" rel="noopener external nofollow noopener noreferrer" title="翻墙浏览器工具">翻墙浏览器工具</a></p>

item.title: 访客统计计数器
item.description: <figure class="highlight plain"><table><tr><td class="gutter"><pre><span class="line">1</span><br><span class="line">2</span><br><span class="line">3</span><br><span class="line">4</span><br><span class="line">5</span><br><span class="line">6</span><br><span class="line">7</span><br><span class="line">8</span><br><span class="line">9</span><br><span class="line">10</span><br><span class="line">11</span><br><span class="line">12</span><br><span class="line">13</span><br><span class="line">14</span><br><span class="line">15</span><br><span class="line">16</span><br></pre></td><td class="code"><pre><span class="line">&lt;!DOCTYPE html PUBLIC &quot;-&#x2F;&#x2F;W3C&#x2F;&#x2F;DTD XHTML 1.0 Transitional&#x2F;&#x2F;EN&quot; &quot;http:&#x2F;&#x2F;www.w3.org&#x2F;TR&#x2F;xhtml1&#x2F;DTD&#x2F;xhtml1-transitional.dtd&quot;&gt; &lt;html xmlns&#x3D;&quot;http:&#x2F;&#x2F;www.w3.org&#x2F;1999&#x2F;xhtml&quot;&gt; &lt;head&gt; </span><br><span class="line">&lt;meta http-equiv&#x3D;&quot;Content-Type&quot; content&#x3D;&quot;text&#x2F;html; charset&#x3D;UTF-8&quot; &#x2F;&gt; </span><br><span class="line">&lt;title&gt;访客统计&lt;&#x2F;title&gt; </span><br><span class="line">&lt;&#x2F;head&gt; &lt;body&gt; </span><br><span class="line"> &lt;?php </span><br><span class="line"> if (!@$fp&#x3D;fopen(&quot;count.txt&quot;, &quot;r&quot;))&#123; &#x2F;&#x2F;以只读的方式打开文件，这步可要可不要根据实际情况来确定。</span><br><span class="line"> echo &quot;count.txt文件创建成功！&lt;br &#x2F;&gt;&quot;; </span><br><span class="line"> &#125;</span><br><span class="line"> @$num&#x3D;fgets($fp,12);&#x2F;&#x2F;读取11位数字 </span><br><span class="line"> if ($num&#x3D;&#x3D;&quot;&quot;)$num&#x3D;0;&#x2F;&#x2F;如果文件count.txt内容为空，则初始化为0 $num++; &#x2F;&#x2F;浏览次数加1 </span><br><span class="line"> @fclose($fp); $fp&#x3D;fopen(&quot;count.txt&quot;, &quot;w&quot;);&#x2F;&#x2F;以只读的方式打开文件 </span><br><span class="line"> fwrite($fp, $num); &#x2F;&#x2F;写入加1后结果 </span><br><span class="line"> fclose($fp); &#x2F;&#x2F;关闭文件 echo &quot;您是第&quot;.$num.&quot;位浏览者！&quot;; </span><br><span class="line"> ?&gt; </span><br><span class="line">&lt;&#x2F;body&gt; </span><br><span class="line">&lt;&#x2F;html&gt;</span><br></pre></td></tr></table></figure>

item.title: zend studio 11.0.0/11.0.0/10.6.1 补丁
item.description: <p>无意间把我的zend studio 10.6.1升级成11.0.2了，又要重新破解。 悲催，只好百度求助，竟然让我找到了，在此分享一下。 补丁地址：<a href="http://download.csdn.net/download/w15875510692/8140777" target="_blank" target="_blank" rel="noopener external nofollow noopener noreferrer">http://download.csdn.net/download/w15875510692/8140777</a></p>

item.title: filezilla安装的问题GLIBCXX_3.4.15
翻墙浏览器
item.description: <p><a href="http://img03.taobaocdn.com/imgextra/i3/809419769/TB2jEpVaVXXXXbSXXXXXXXXXXXX_!!809419769.jpg" target="_blank" target="_blank" rel="noopener external nofollow noopener noreferrer"><img src="http://img03.taobaocdn.com/imgextra/i3/809419769/TB2jEpVaVXXXXbSXXXXXXXXXXXX_!!809419769.jpg" alt="艾瑞可erik"></a>最近发现老版本的ChromeGAE不能翻墙了，很郁闷，谷歌站长又不能用了。 无奈百度了一下，找到最新的翻墙软件，感觉还可以吧。在这分享一下。 效果还是不错的 O(∩<em>∩)O哈哈~ [![艾瑞可erik](<a href="http://img03.taobaocdn.com/imgextra/i3/809419769/TB2sOtWaVXXXXbmXXXXXXXXXXXX" target="_blank" target="_blank" rel="noopener external nofollow noopener noreferrer">http://img03.taobaocdn.com/imgextra/i3/809419769/TB2sOtWaVXXXXbmXXXXXXXXXXXX</a></em>!!809419769.jpg)](<a href="http://img03.taobaocdn.com/imgextra/i3/809419769/TB2sOtWaVXXXXbmXXXXXXXXXXXX_!!809419769.jpg" target="_blank" target="_blank" rel="noopener external nofollow noopener noreferrer">http://img03.taobaocdn.com/imgextra/i3/809419769/TB2sOtWaVXXXXbmXXXXXXXXXXXX_!!809419769.jpg</a>) 下载地址：<a href="http://pan.baidu.com/s/1hqy1KaS" target="_blank" target="_blank" rel="noopener external nofollow noopener noreferrer">http://pan.baidu.com/s/1hqy1KaS</a></p>

item.title: 常用工具
item.description: <p>memcached 高速缓存工具（linux） wget <a href="https://sourceforge.net/projects/erik1314/files/memcache/libevent-1.4.14b-stable.tar.gz" target="_blank" target="_blank" rel="noopener external nofollow noopener noreferrer">https://sourceforge.net/projects/erik1314/files/memcache/libevent-1.4.14b-stable.tar.gz</a> wget <a href="https://sourceforge.net/projects/erik1314/files/memcache/memcached-1.4.20.tar.gz" target="_blank" target="_blank" rel="noopener external nofollow noopener noreferrer">https://sourceforge.net/projects/erik1314/files/memcache/memcached-1.4.20.tar.gz</a> wget <a href="https://sourceforge.net/projects/erik1314/files/memcache/memcache-2.2.1.tgz" target="_blank" target="_blank" rel="noopener external nofollow noopener noreferrer">https://sourceforge.net/projects/erik1314/files/memcache/memcache-2.2.1.tgz</a> <a href="https://sourceforge.net/projects/erik1314/files/memcache/libevent-1.4.14b-stable.tar.gz" target="_blank" target="_blank" rel="noopener external nofollow noopener noreferrer">libevent-1.4.14b-stable.tar.gz</a> <a href="https://sourceforge.net/projects/erik1314/files/memcache/memcached-1.4.20.tar.gz" target="_blank" target="_blank" rel="noopener external nofollow noopener noreferrer">memcached-1.4.20.tar.gz</a> <a href="https://sourceforge.net/projects/erik1314/files/memcache/memcache-2.2.1.tgz" target="_blank" target="_blank" rel="noopener external nofollow noopener noreferrer">memcache-2.2.1.tgz</a></p>
